title: TOP-VIGOR 12Pcs 9 Inch Extra Large Pull Bow, Metallic Gift Wrapping Bows Ribbon Organza for Wedding Baskets Presents Christmas Valentine's Day Birthday Gift Decorations, Silver
features: 【Ideal size】 – Large Pull Bows Wrapping Pull Bow Ribbon You will receive 12 pieces bows for gift wrapping, are in size of : 17cm x 22cm/7-inch x 9-inch(W*L).

【Extra Large Pull Bow for Stunning Presentation】 – Made from premium metallic organza, these extra-large pull bows add a luxurious and eye-catching touch to any gift, making your presents stand out beautifully.
【Effortless to Assemble】 – Simply pull the inner ribbons to create a perfectly shaped, voluminous bow in seconds. No special skills required, making gift wrapping easy and hassle-free.

【Versatile for Various Occasions】 – Ideal for weddings, Christmas, Valentine's Day, birthdays, baby showers, and gift baskets. Also perfect for decorating party favors, floral arrangements, and festive décor.
【Durable & Elegant Metallic Finish】 – Crafted from high-quality organza with a metallic sheen, these bows hold their shape well and provide a sophisticated, shimmering effect for any special event.
description: Product Description Make your gifts and decorations shine with our Extra Large Metallic Pull Bows! Designed with high-quality organza and a radiant metallic finish, these bows instantly elevate any present or event décor. The easy pull-to-shape design allows you to create a full, luxurious bow in seconds—no complicated tying needed! Perfect for weddings, birthdays, Christmas, Valentine's Day, baby showers, and gift baskets, these bows add a sophisticated charm to any occasion. Whether adorning presents, floral arrangements, or party decorations, their durable, lightweight construction ensures they hold their shape beautifully without fraying. Available in multiple colors to suit different themes, these extra-large pull bows provide a professional, polished look to your wrapping. Transform your gifts into elegant masterpieces effortlessly!
